item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
As someone from BC, there's a feeling to this that's very…BC. Deer, mysterious broadcasts from the forest, shades of paranoia. All stuff that would make a good SCP if you aren't from here, but it becomes strangely familiar when it is.
+1 for mysterious reasons.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
One deer places its hoof on its forehead and holds it for a few seconds

are deer physically capable of doing that? I don't think their shoulders rotate that way (that's why most quadrupeds scratch themselves with their hind legs).

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: These kinds of SCPs always make me think that they're left over from something, stranded, lost in our world. Makes me wonder what one would do if tomorrow you woke up in place that didn't make sense to you, that didn't accept you, that you stood out in just by being. What would you end up doing?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: That started off very silly and got very creepy very fast. Was not expecting as disturbing of addendums as there were. Well done! +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Those are some fair inconsistencies which I haven't noticed until now, and I will make amends

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
No vote.

This doesn't do a whole lot for me, and there are enough inconsistencies in the article to make me post. Or maybe I just missed something.

+ show block
– hide block

Deer involved in SCP-3990-1 events will treat humans with unnatural aggression during the process.

Fair enough.

SCP-3990-2 move at an extremely fast pace, and can outrun vehicles such as jeeps and helicopters, clocked at a top speed of 135mph.

Most helicopters move a good deal faster than 135mph, though I suppose deer can typically turn on a dime and copters cannot.

1540: The deer begin to make glances at the researchers. A few sounds resembling growls are heard.

I thought you said they display "unnatural aggression" toward humans? They seem to barely acknowledge the researchers.

The team pushes further through the crowd of deer, which seem to be completely unfazed. Another sound is picked up by the deer over the noises of the crowd.

Again, I thought you said they display "unnatural aggression" toward humans? They seem to be completely ignoring the MTF.

The deer in the vicinity scramble past the team, knocking down Mishra.

Okay, not sure if you know anything about deer, but a herd of deer that thick suddenly going crazy amidst two humans, those humans are going to be severely injured if not dead. Deer are tough SOBs, and even if they not active thrashing antlers and bucking hooves at the MTF, they're likely to trample them.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I absolutely love how bizarre this is.

My only note is that tranquilizers are not instant and usually take anywhere from 1 to 10 minutes for full effect depending on dosage, formulation, injection site, and a number of other factors.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Building off of what Roget said, it managed to make zero sense while simultaneously making perfect sense, and I think that's the essence of a good SCP. And there's good imagery, like the metal-head deer and 'deer fingers'.

Great work, Sterbs, +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I love the weirdness of this — it doesn't come off like it was made by larger forces of good and evil, or someone made a wish and it went wrong, or whatever. The universe is just malfunctioning and jamming together the concepts of deer and newscasts. [Edit: very +1]

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Wanted to say - I read this last night, and liked it.
Read it again today, liked it better. Good job.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Possible insight...
From chat during draft stage.

I suggested that maybe this is "something trying to force a deer-shaped peg into an anchorman-shaped hole".

I don't know if that's what Sterbai went with or not, though. Still, it's open to interpretation…

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
My hypothesis.. Maybe spoilers?

+ show block
– hide block

SCP-3990 is… People?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Hey, you forgot me! :P no biggie tho

I'm glad to see that you've got this all sorted out. It looks nice.

+1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: This is so goddamn weird but also makes sense in its own moon (forest?) logic. That and its unsettling nature make it a great SCP. +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
New skip! With thanks to:

Ember16
ARD
Tufto
Weryllium
Roget
Nnelg

If I've forgotten anyone I apologise

Image is https://commons.m.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Deer_at_night_(10696965166).jpg, cropped to remove some information as it's originally a trail cam image
